channel.title: Group Tours on Passport Stories
channel.description: Recent content in Group Tours on Passport Stories

item.title: Tanzania Safari Group Tour
item.description:
Ngorongoro Crater, Serengeti & Serval Wildlife

Sanctuary | 7 Days

Fixed-Date Group Tour

This tour runs on fixed dates with a pre-defined itinerary and is ideal for travelers who prefer a well-planned group safari experience.

The tour is operated by our trusted local partner in Tanzania. While we may not be physically present on this trip, the itinerary, quality standards, and coordination are carefully curated and overseen by us to ensure a smooth and reliable experience.

item.title: Kenya Safari Private Tour
item.description:
Kenya Highlights Safari | 8 Days

Kenya Highlights Safari | 8 Days

Nairobi •Maasai Mara • Lake Nakuru • Lake Naivasha • Amboseli

Fixed-Date Group Tour

This is a fixed-date group safari with a pre-defined itinerary covering Kenya’s most iconic wildlife and landscapes.

The tour is operated by our trusted local partner in Kenya. While we may not be physically present on this trip, the itinerary, routing, accommodations, and overall experience are carefully curated and coordinated by us to ensure reliability and quality.

item.title: Africa Travel Planning & Facilitation
item.description:
Traveling to Africa can feel overwhelming. Multiple

countries, visas, safaris, long drives, safety questions, and logistics.

That’s where we come in.

We help you plan a smooth, safe, and well-structured Africa

trip by working closely with trusted local partners in Kenya and Tanzania,

so you can travel with confidence and zero stress.

How It Works

Simple. Transparent. No unnecessary middlemen.

Our Facilitation Fee

USD 150 per person

One-time planning and facilitation fee

item.title: Netherlands & Belgium 4 days
item.description:
Our Insights: Tips and lessons from our firsthand experiences—things  we wish we knew before traveling! 

Preparation Tips: Insurance, currency, visa info, SIM cards, and other  essentials to get you ready for the trip. 

Comprehensive 4-Day Itinerary: A tested plan to make the most of  your time exploring Belgium and Amsterdam.

item.title: Paris 4 days itinerary
item.description:
Prep Tips: Everything you need to know before you go—insurance,  currency, visas, SIM cards, and more.

Our Insights: Learn from our firsthand experiences, with tips we wish  we had known!

Detailed 4-Day Plan: Make the most of your time with a day-by-day  itinerary covering all the must-see sights. 

Activity Booking Links: Save time with direct links to book top  attractions.

item.title: Switzerland 7 Day Itinerary
item.description:
Our Insights: Tips and lessons from our firsthand experiences—things  we wish we knew before traveling!  

Preparation Tips: The best time to visit, travel insurance advice,  currency and visa guidance, SIM card options, and how to make the  most of your Swiss Pass.  

Detailed 7-Day Itinerary: A day-by-day plan with alternatives to match  your preferences and pace.  Attraction

Booking Links: Save time with curated links to the places  we loved most.

item.title: Northern Lights Private Tour 2026
item.description:
This 7 nights/8 days guided winter adventure in Finland is crafted for dreamers and lovers of snow covered landscapes.

Enjoy husky safaris, glass igloos and magical Northern Lights.

day

Day 1: Arrival in Helsinki
Day 2: Lapland Tour
Day 3: Northern Lights Safari

accommodation

Glass Igloo Resort
Arctic TreeHouse Hotel

inclusion

Airport transfer
Daily breakfast
Snowmobile safari

fees

Flights not included
Personal expenses

item.title: Our Story
item.description: story: title: Our Story images: top: assets/images/uploads/story1.jpg bottom: assets/images/hero/Gallery/Gallery/Europe/Greece/story2.jpg paragraphs: - > We are Mahulima and Kaustuv, the faces behind Passport Stories. We create travel content to inspire you and make planning your next adventure easier, helping you explore the world in a way that fits your style. - > Over the years, we’ve explored the globe and collected memories from every corner. In Europe, we’ve visited all countries, capturing the Swiss Alps, Norwegian fjords, Santorini sunsets, hot air balloons over Cappadocia, Iceland’s dramatic landscapes, tulip fields in the Netherlands, Finland’s winter wonderlands, and romantic evenings in Paris. - > In the Americas, we’ve journeyed through Chile, Argentina and Patagonia; Ecuador, Peru, and Bolivia; Brazil; all of Central America; 40 U.S. states; Mexico; and the Bahamas. In Africa, we’ve explored Morocco, Egypt, Namibia, Botswana, Zimbabwe, and Zambia, and even set foot on the icy continent of Antarctica. - > In Asia, our travels have taken us to Israel, Jordan, Azerbaijan, Armenia, and beyond. Back home in India, we’ve discovered 23 states, each with its own culture, landscapes, and experiences. - > Travel teaches lessons no book can. Through our stories, we aim to inspire you to step out of your comfort zone, explore new places, plan trips with confidence, and capture unforgettable memories. With years of global experience, we’ve learned the tips and tricks that make journeys smoother, more meaningful, and full of discovery — and now we want to share that with you.

item.title: Ready To Go Products
item.description: All our digital products are available for instant download.

item.title: Tanzania Safari Group Tour
item.description: This is a guided group safari covering Tanzania’s top wildlife parks with experienced local guides.

item.title: Traveling from 10 to 15 Days
item.description: What you’ll get with our Passport Stories itinerary package:  A custom-made travel plan designed just for you, whether you’re a couple or a family of four (2 adults + 2 kids under 18).  Day-by-day schedule with must-see spots, activities, and experiences at every destination.  A handpicked list of stays—apartments and hotels you can choose from, based on comfort and budget.  Email support while we shape your trip together, so you can ask questions and tweak plans before you travel.  Our signature Passport Stories travel tips, straight from our own journeys, to make your trip smoother and more memorable.

item.title: Traveling upto 10 Days
item.description:
What you’ll get with our Passport Stories itinerary package

  • A custom-made travel plan designed just for you, whether you’re a couple or a family of four (2 adults + 2 kids under 18).
  • Day-by-day schedule with must-see spots, activities, and experiences at every destination.
  • A handpicked list of stays—apartments and hotels you can choose from, based on comfort and budget.
  • Email support while we shape your trip together, so you can ask questions and tweak plans before you travel.
  • Our signature Passport Stories travel tips, straight from our own journeys, to make your trip smoother and more memorable

item.title: Traveling upto 6 Days
item.description:
What you’ll get with our Passport Stories itinerary package:

  • A custom-made travel plan designed just for you, whether you’re a couple or a family of four (2 adults + 2 kids under 18).
  • Day-by-day schedule with must-see spots, activities, and experiences at every destination.
  • A handpicked list of stays—apartments and hotels you can choose from, based on comfort and budget.
  • Email support while we shape your trip together, so you can ask questions and tweak plans before you travel.
  • Our signature Passport Stories travel tips, straight from our own journeys, to make your trip smoother and morememorable.
